waves.name: Unblock both tracks
waves.objective: Land the Knots execution_plan type and rip out Foolery compat-status abstractions so downstream work can proceed.

steps.notes: Concurrent foundations: Knots-repo execution_plan type (a9a2) and Foolery compat-status removal (48c1).

waves.name: Persist payload and rebuild plan path
waves.objective: Persist execution_plan payload in Knots and replace legacy Scene coupling in Foolery's plan API.

steps.notes: Concurrent follow-ons: persist execution_plan payload in Knots (a431, needs a9a2) and rebuild POST /api/plans without Scene coupling (dd18, needs 48c1).

waves.name: Live validate
waves.objective: Exercise the repaired execution-plan API end-to-end against a real Knots repo.

steps.notes: Live validation (54e9): exercise the repaired /api/plans against a real Knots repo. Blocked by 48c1 + dd18.

data.title: Finish native execution_plan rollout and Foolery repair
